title: festuca arundinacea subsp. atlantigena
intro: Festuca arundinacea subsp. atlantigena, also known as tall fescue, is a subspecies of grass native to the Iberian Peninsula and the western Mediterranean region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Festuca arundinacea subsp. atlantigena include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and possessing antimicrobial properties. Festuca arundinacea subsp. atlantigena can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its uses and preparations are not widely documented and more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
